case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO TAX COLLECTOR VS. MATTHEW WILLISON

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,324.20 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT WILLISON, MATTHEW ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-23-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO TAX COLLECTOR

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WILLISON, MATTHEW $3,324.20 PRINCIPAL, $45.99 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,370.19 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $45.99 SERVED JUL-15-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT WILLISON, MATTHEW
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT WILLISON, MATTHEW

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-23-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-23-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO TAX COLLECTOR IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY WAH-MEI LEW, SENIOR COLLECTION OFFICER. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT MATTHEW WILLISON. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-23-2017 - JUDGMENT.
